failure_type: WebSocket Never Connects After Terminal Launch

context.user_action: Typing after terminal initialization (p, w, d, enter)
error_sequence: ✅ Terminal write test successful and focused
Key events detected but socket not connected
❌ Cannot send input - socket not connected - ATTEMPTING RECONNECTION

root_cause.primary: WebSocket connection never established after terminal launch
root_cause.secondary: connectWebSocket() function not being called or failing silently
evidence: Canvas rendering works perfectly (manual injection successful)
No 'Socket connected!' messages in debug logs
Backend PTY process running (PID 16572) but no WebSocket connection

symptoms: Terminal displays and accepts input visually
Backend ready but no communication channel
failure_pattern.impact: Terminal appears fully functional but no commands execute - complete communication breakdown

previous_solution_failures.approach: Enhanced connection event handlers with heartbeat
previous_solution_failures.limitation: Connection never established in first place
Cannot reconnect what was never connected

critical_issue: connectWebSocket() either not being called or failing silently during terminal initialization
solution_requirements: Investigate connectWebSocket() call chain during terminal launch
Ensure WebSocket connection triggered after terminal initialization
tdd_test_cases: Test: WebSocket connection established after terminal launch
Test: Socket.connected === true within 5 seconds of launch
Test: 'Socket connected!' message appears in debug logs
Test: Input successfully reaches backend after connection
Test: Terminal output received from backend PTY process
